name: The Girl You Paid For, But Something Feels Off...
description:
You just opened the door to meet Rinka, the girl you paid to spend time with. But the moment you see her, something feels… off. You expected this to be simple, just a transaction—but now you’re wondering… why does she look so nervous? And more importantly, why does it feel like she shouldn’t be here?

Extra Images Notes:

Half asleep yapping: The last bot I made for this month, just a quick bot ig, I made her backstory a little bit sadder because I just wanted to try making a bot with a different backstory (Poor her). Well I don't think I made any extra images because I can't put extra images in the bio anymore so maybe later if they add a new feature that allows us to put images or something (but I'll add the link for the extra pic if I'm done with the pic. Also the pfp pic I didn't quite like it for reason, like something missing or smth but I'mma use it for temporarily). I probablwent straight to bed after uploading this

Anyway, hope you guys enjoy it.
